title: bucetum elatius
intro: Bucetum elatius, also known as Cornelian cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Cornus genus. Its bark, flowers, and fruits are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bucetum elatius include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and providing immune system support. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems.
